metadata.title: IDearCraft
metadata.keywords: IDearCraft, DIY workshop, Philadelphia, handmade, crafting classes, party, shop
metadata.ogImageAlt: Hands-on crafting and workshop atmosphere at IDearCraft

footer.tagline: Handmade experience studio · Classes, parties & supplies.

cookie.text: We use cookies to improve your experience and analytics. By continuing you agree to our practices (demo copy — replace with your policy).
cookie.dialogDescription: We ask for your consent before using optional cookies.
cookie.settingsAlert: Demo: wire your cookie settings panel here.

home.heroBody: Small classes, party planning & a supply shop — turn ideas into something you can hold.

diy.name: DIY Projects
diy.blurb: Explore hands-on creative projects, perfect for crafting enthusiasts or just having fun! Projects last around 1.5 hours.

workshop.name: Workshop
workshop.blurb: Participate in various workshops that span 2 to 4 hours, designed to inspire creativity through guided activities with instructors.

party.name: Party
party.blurb: Enjoy a vibrant party atmosphere with creative themes and activities, perfect for gatherings and celebrations, lasting around 3 hours.

booking.title: Services we offer
booking.intro: Same three services as the homepage. Pick one, then choose a date and time.
booking.slotHint: After dates load, pick a time slot (demo uses mock availability).

bookingFlow.pickDayHint: Demo: next 10 days are open. Connect Cal.com, Wix Bookings, or your API in production.
bookingFlow.name: Name
bookingFlow.doneAlert: Demo complete: add deposit payment or confirmation email here.

shop.title: Shop
shop.intro: Browse → product → add to cart. Demo products; swap in Stripe or Square for payments.

atelierStarterKit.name: Atelier starter kit
atelierStarterKit.shortDescription: Tools and starter materials — great for first-timers.
atelierStarterKit.description: Carefully picked paper, cordage, and basic tools with a step-by-step guide so you can keep the studio rhythm at home.

seasonalGiftBox.name: Seasonal gift box · limited palette
seasonalGiftBox.shortDescription: Packaging and colors rotate with the season — perfect for gifting.
seasonalGiftBox.description: Three small craft projects inside, with a handwritten note card and gift wrap. Limited quantities while supplies last.

studioMerchCap.name: Studio merch · baseball cap
studioMerchCap.shortDescription: Embroidered logo; comfortable for everyday wear.
studioMerchCap.description: Breathable cotton with subtle embroidery. Pick up in studio or ship — enter your address at checkout.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.intro: Shipping → review → done (demo, no real charge).
checkout.emptyBody: Add something to your cart before checking out.
checkout.doneBody: Order marked complete (demo). Continue shopping or book a class.

about.title: About IDearCraft
about.p1: This page maps to the original /aboutus route. We rebuilt the stack in Next.js; tone follows a warm, invitation-style studio site.
about.p2: We believe making isn’t only about technique — it’s about slowing down: choosing colors, folds, knots — small decisions that add up to confidence and gifts.
about.contactBody: Party packages and custom group events are arranged directly with the studio. Message us on Instagram @idearcrafts, TikTok @idearcrafts, or 小红书 via the footer links — we’ll reply as soon as we can.

diyPage.title: DIY Projects
diyPage.intro: We offer various services as DIY project, Workshop, and party size events. Check out the projects below and learn about the details and offers by clicking "price list".
diyPage.dialogDescription: Project details, reservation fee, duration, and price list.
diyPage.priceTableCaption: Price list by item and size

comingSoon.title: New collection on the way
comingSoon.body: Framer search index included a /coming-soon route. Use this for teasers, email capture, or a countdown.
